licence.p: This work is licenced under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 Unported Licence. To view a copy of the licence, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ or send a letter to Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.

projectDesc.p: The project DHARMA has received funding from the European Research Council (ERC) under the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme (grant agreement no 809994).

prefixDef.p: Public URIs with the prefix bib to point to a Zotero Group Library named ERC-DHARMA whose data are open to the public.
Internal URIs using the part prefix to point to person elements in the DHARMA_idListMembers_v01.xml file.

lg.label: Face A
lg.l: tasmai nityacite śivāya vibhave rājño ’rthasiddhyai namaḥ .
rūpaṁ yasya navendumaṇḍitaśikhan trayyāḥ pratītaṁ paraṁ
sākṣād akṣaram āmananti munayo yogādhigamyan namas
Ekā prāk kalahaṁsavibhramagatiḥ kāntonmanā yā satī
sā śaktiś śivasaṅgatodayakarī gaurī parā pātu vaḥ.
sārvvaś śārvvam atiṣṭhipat savibhavaṁ liṅgaṁ vidhānānvitam· .
puṇyan nāma sarasvatīti dadhatī khyātā jagatpāvanī
nānāmnāyagirāṁ gabhīram adhikaṁ pātraṁ dvijānāṁ varaṁ
sindhūnām iva sindhurājam agamad yā viśvarūpaṁ priyam· .
lebhe janmāvadātaṁ bhuvanahitakarī yā dvitīyeva lakṣmīḥ .
yāṁ saṁprāpya mahendravarmmanr̥patis sārthām adhād īśatām· .
vaddhnan padmānuvandhaṁ prakaṭitatapasā tena patyā prajānām
devyān tasyām adityān divasakara ivotpāditaḥ kaśyapena
yaś śaiśave py āśu tathā kalābhiḥ
pūrvvaṁ mahan maṇḍalam eva tac ca
yaḥ prāpya bhāsvān iva madhyam ahnaḥ .
citraṁ mahat karmma ca darśayan yaḥ
nūnaṁ kathā kā punar eva yasmin· .
śraddhā ca bhaktiś ca parā yadīyā

div.p: First edited by Louis Finot (309-352) with a French translation; re-edited by Dominic Goodall (77-260) with an English translation and commentary.
